$comment: Phase 1 plan 05 (D-18). Default-deny on git invocations; this file enumerates the exemption set. Phase 2 will REMOVE bin/lib/*.cjs entries as each call site migrates to the adapter.
$comment_wr_11: WR-11 widened the scanner to also flag bare `git <cmd>` in shell scripts (.sh/.bash). scripts/{base64,prompt-injection,secret}-scan.sh legitimately need to compute the diff between $base and HEAD via git; their output drives the scan-report-only workflow and cannot use the VcsAdapter (it would be circular — the adapter is JS-side, these are shell pre-commit-style filters).
$comment_2_1_09: Phase 2.1 plan 09 (D-22 closing). Removed 9 entries that no longer carry raw-git invocations after the phase-2 migration sweep: (a) pure parsers parse/git-rev.ts + parse/jj-rev.ts; (b) tests/helpers.cjs (migrated to VcsAdapter in 02-02/02-03); (c) scripts/run-tests.cjs (zero raw-git); (d) docs/adr/0004-*.md (markdown not scanned anyway); (e) redundant test-file entries already covered by globs sdk/src/vcs/__tests__/** and tests/**/*.test.cjs: adapter-contract.test.ts, expr.test.ts, parse-git-rev.test.ts, backends.test.ts, tests/vcs-adapter-contract.test.cjs. D-22 hard rule: never add entries; this commit only removes.
